title: harrisia fernowii
intro: Harrisia fernowii, also known as the Night-blooming Cereus or Night-blooming Pincushion Cactus, is a species of cactus that belongs to the family Cactaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Harrisia fernowii include its ability to reduce swelling, improve wound healing, and protect against cell damage. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including skin irritations and digestive issues.
